vocab.example: To curb my frustration during a standstill, I try to focus on a deep-breathing routine rather than obsessing over the clock.
If I notice a bottleneck ahead on my GPS, I usually take that time to mentally rehearse my upcoming presentations.
I transform my car into a serene environment by playing lo-fi beats, which helps me stay composed amidst the honking.
I view traffic jams as unproductive downtime, so I combat the boredom by catching up on missed phone calls with family.

vocab.meaning: di chuyển chậm chạp (bò trên đường)
vocab.example: While we crawl along the expressway, I often find myself observing the architectural details of the surrounding buildings.

vocab.meaning: người bị bắt buộc phải nghe (trong ngữ cảnh này là chính mình khi bị kẹt trong xe)
vocab.example: Since I'm a captive audience to my own radio, I use the delay to listen to insightful documentaries that I normally ignore.

vocab.meaning: thử thách giới hạn của cái gì
vocab.example: The rush hour congestion truly tests the limits of my endurance, especially after a taxing eight-hour workday.

vocab.meaning: nơi trú ẩn tâm trí (trạng thái bình tâm)
vocab.example: I try to create a mental sanctuary by visualizing my weekend plans, which prevents me from succumbing to road rage.

vocab.meaning: sự tắc nghẽn giao thông (thuật ngữ trang trọng hơn)
vocab.example: Whenever I’m caught in heavy traffic congestion, I find it’s the perfect opportunity to practice my foreign language pronunciation.

vocab.meaning: đi qua những con phố chằng chịt như mê cung
vocab.example: Sometimes I try to navigate the labyrinthine streets nearby to find a shortcut, even if it only saves me a couple of minutes.
